creator: anders@fix.no
text:
On Mon, Oct 15, 2001 at 01:27:13PM +0300, Peter Pentchev wrote:
> Why?  You did originally write those pkg-descr files, right?

I wrote all of them originally except for:

ports/sysutils/bchunk/pkg-descr
ports/www/mod_mp3/pkg-descr

> Even though you are no longer the maintainer of those ports, I see
> no real reason to remove your name from there.  Unless, of course,
> you say that you would just like it that way - then we'd have to
> honor your request as the author and as a person :)

I just didn't see a good reason to stay there as long as I'm not
maintaining the ports. Oh well. Perhaps the Porter's Handbook should
indicate that pkg-descr should be signed by the person that wrote
pkg-descr, if that is the case? Anyway, do as you please. Feel free to
just close the PR.

Cheers,

-- 
Anders.
